  • Endpoints
    • GET api/health
    • GET api/ready
    • GET /api/v1/public/home Home page data. No auth required.
    • GET /api/v1/public/announcements Published announcements, paginated. No auth required.
    • GET /api/v1/public/announcements/{slug} Single announcement by slug. No auth required.
    • GET /api/v1/public/locations All active locations. No auth required.
    • GET /api/v1/public/downloads Active downloads. No auth required.
    • GET /api/v1/public/verify-certificate/{token} Certificate verification. No auth required.
    • GET /api/v1/auth/captcha Generate a new math captcha. Public endpoint.
    • POST /api/v1/auth/login Authenticate user. Detects platform via X-App-Type header.
    • POST /api/v1/auth/logout Logout user. Handles both token and session auth.
    • GET /api/v1/auth/user Returns the authenticated user's data.
    • POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password Send password reset link.
    • POST /api/v1/auth/reset-password Reset password using token.
    • GET /api/v1/period-context Returns the active period, available periods, and current phase.

    • Generate a new API key (admin-only, protected by admin secret).

    • Self-service registration — client registers and receives an API key.
    • List / filter data from an allowed table using Eloquent.

  • Documentation powered by Scribe ✍
  • Last updated: May 6, 2026

Introduction

    <h1>SIBERMAS API Documentation</h1>
    <p>
    Sistem Informasi Bimbingan Pengabdian Masyarakat (SIBERMAS) REST API v1.
    This documentation covers all available endpoints for KKN management at UIN Prof. K.H. Saifuddin Zuhri Purwokerto.
    </p>
    <h2>Authentication</h2>
    <p>Most endpoints require authentication via Sanctum Bearer tokens. Use the `/api/v1/auth/login` endpoint to obtain your token.</p>
    <h2>Rate Limiting</h2>
    <p>API endpoints are rate-limited to prevent abuse. Exceeding limits will result in HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) responses.</p>
    <h2>Error Responses</h2>
    <p>All error responses follow a standard format with <code>success: false</code>, error code, and message.</p>
Base URL: http://localhost:8000 
This documentation aims to provide all the information you need to work with our API.

<aside>As you scroll, you'll see code examples for working with the API in different programming languages in the dark area to the right (or as part of the content on mobile).
You can switch the language used with the tabs at the top right (or from the nav menu at the top left on mobile).</aside>

Authenticating requests

To authenticate requests, include an Authorization header with the value "Bearer your-token".

All authenticated endpoints are marked with a requires authentication badge in the documentation below.

Endpoints

GET api/health

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8000/api/health" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/health"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
vary: Origin
 

{
    "status": "ok",
    "timestamp": "2026-05-06T12:42:32+07:00"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Authorization

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Example: application/json

GET api/ready

requires authentication

curl --request GET \

    method: "GET",

GET /api/v1/public/home Home page data. No auth required.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/public/home" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/public/home"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
x-ratelimit-limit: 60
x-ratelimit-remaining: 59
vary: Origin
 

{
    "success": true,
    "message": "OK",
    "data": {
        "featuredAnnouncements": [],
        "featuredDownloads": [],
        "stats": {
            "students": 0,
            "groups": 0,
            "locations": 0
        },
        "aboutContent": {
            "visi": "Menjadi Lembaga Penelitian dan Pengabdian kepada Masyarakat yang unggul dan kompetitif dalam pengembangan ilmu pengetahuan, teknologi, dan seni yang berbasis pada nilai-nilai moderasi Islam dan kearifan lokal."
        }
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

GET /api/v1/public/announcements Published announcements, paginated. No auth required.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/public/announcements" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/public/announcements"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
x-ratelimit-limit: 60
x-ratelimit-remaining: 59
vary: Origin
 

{
    "success": true,
    "message": "OK",
    "data": [],
    "meta": {
        "current_page": 1,
        "last_page": 1,
        "per_page": 12,
        "total": 0,
        "from": null,
        "to": null
    },
    "links": {
        "first": "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/public/announcements?page=1",
        "last": "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/public/announcements?page=1",
        "prev": null,
        "next": null
    }
}

Request      

GET api/v1/public/announcements

Headers

Authorization

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

GET /api/v1/public/announcements/{slug} Single announcement by slug. No auth required.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/public/announcements/architecto" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/public/announcements/architecto"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (404):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
x-ratelimit-limit: 60
x-ratelimit-remaining: 59
vary: Origin
 

{
    "success": false,
    "error": {
        "code": "NOT_FOUND",
        "message": "Berita tidak ditemukan."
    }
}

GET /api/v1/public/locations All active locations. No auth required.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/public/locations" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/public/locations"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

POST /api/v1/auth/login Authenticate user. Detects platform via X-App-Type header.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"login\": \"b\",
    \"password\": \"|]|{+-\",
    \"captcha_id\": \"architecto\",
    \"captcha_answer\": \"ngzmiy\",
    \"remember\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "login": "b",
    "password": "|]|{+-",
    "captcha_id": "architecto",
    "captcha_answer": "ngzmiy",
    "remember": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/v1/auth/login

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

login   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: b

password   string     

Example: |]|{+-

captcha_id   string     

Example: architecto

captcha_answer   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 10 karakter. Example: ngzmiy

remember   boolean  optional    

Example: false

PATCH /api/v1/profile

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PATCH \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/profile" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"phone\": \"ngzmiyvdljnikhwa\",
    \"address\": \"y\",
    \"domicile_village_name\": \"k\",
    \"domicile_district_name\": \"c\",
    \"domicile_regency_name\": \"m\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/profile"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "phone": "ngzmiyvdljnikhwa",
    "address": "y",
    "domicile_village_name": "k",
    "domicile_district_name": "c",
    "domicile_regency_name": "m"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

PATCH api/v1/profile

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: b

phone   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 20 karakter. Example: ngzmiyvdljnikhwa

address   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 500 karakter. Example: y

domicile_village_name   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: k

domicile_district_name   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: c

domicile_regency_name   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: m

POST /api/v1/profile/avatar

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/profile/avatar" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "avatar=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/php7hqin2v3i7du7sWaPKY" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/profile/avatar"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('avatar', document.querySelector('input[name="avatar"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

POST api/v1/student/posko

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/posko" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "latitude=-89"\
    --form "longitude=-179"\
    --form "gmaps_link=g"\
    --form "photo=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/php3kpbv0geb5bq50gqP06" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/posko"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('latitude', '-89');
body.append('longitude', '-179');
body.append('gmaps_link', 'g');
body.append('photo', document.querySelector('input[name="photo"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/student/posko

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

latitude   number     

value harus antara -90 dan 90. Example: -89

longitude   number     

value harus antara -180 dan 180. Example: -179

gmaps_link   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 500 karakter. Example: g

photo   file  optional    

value harus berupa gambar. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 5120 kilobytes. Example: /private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/php3kpbv0geb5bq50gqP06

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/domisili" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"domisili_address\": \"b\",
    \"domisili_village\": \"n\",
    \"domisili_district\": \"g\",
    \"domisili_regency\": \"z\",
    \"domisili_province\": \"m\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/domisili"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "domisili_address": "b",
    "domisili_village": "n",
    "domisili_district": "g",
    "domisili_regency": "z",
    "domisili_province": "m"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

domisili_district   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: g

domisili_regency   string  optional

POST api/v1/student/registration

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/registration" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"periode_id\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/registration"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "periode_id": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

POST api/v1/student/daily-reports

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/daily-reports" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "date=2022-05-31"\
    --form "category=n"\
    --form "title=g"\
    --form "abcd_stage=zmiyvdljnikhwayk"\
    --form "activity=architecto"\
    --form "reflection=architecto"\
    --form "social_media_link=n"\
    --form "output=architecto"\
    --form "latitude=-89"\
    --form "longitude=-180"\
    --form "gps_accuracy=16"\
    --form "captured_at=2026-05-06T12:42:33"\
    --form "location_source=miyvdljnikhwaykc"\
    --form "location_name=m"\
    --form "files[]=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpsphd0qkhb142dDasAtA" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/daily-reports"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('date', '2022-05-31');
body.append('category', 'n');
body.append('title', 'g');
body.append('abcd_stage', 'zmiyvdljnikhwayk');
body.append('activity', 'architecto');
body.append('reflection', 'architecto');
body.append('social_media_link', 'n');
body.append('output', 'architecto');
body.append('latitude', '-89');
body.append('longitude', '-180');
body.append('gps_accuracy', '16');
body.append('captured_at', '2026-05-06T12:42:33');
body.append('location_source', 'miyvdljnikhwaykc');
body.append('location_name', 'm');
body.append('files[]', document.querySelector('input[name="files[]"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/student/daily-reports

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

date   string     

value bukan tanggal yang sah. Must be a date before or equal to today. Example: 2022-05-31

category   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 50 karakter. Example: n

title   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 200 karakter. Example: g

abcd_stage   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 20 karakter. Example: zmiyvdljnikhwayk

activity   string     

Example: architecto

reflection   string  optional    

Example: architecto

social_media_link   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: n

output   string  optional    

Example: architecto

latitude   number     

value harus antara -90 dan 90. Example: -89

longitude   number     

value harus antara -180 dan 180. Example: -180

gps_accuracy   number  optional    

value harus minimal 0. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 5000. Example: 16

captured_at   string     

value bukan tanggal yang sah. Example: 2026-05-06T12:42:33

location_source   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 20 karakter. Example: miyvdljnikhwaykc

location_name   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: m

files   file[]  optional    

Must be a file. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 5120 kilobytes.

Headers

Authorization

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: b

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

sdg_goals   object  optional    
objectives   string  optional    

Example: architecto

target_participants   integer  optional    

value harus minimal 1. Example: 22

budget   number  optional    

value harus minimal 0. Example: 84

kategori   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 100 karakter. Example: z

);

};

POST api/v1/student/leave-requests

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/leave-requests" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "tanggal_mulai=2052-05-29"\
    --form "tanggal_kembali=2052-05-29"\
    --form "alasan=n"\
    --form "file_bukti=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/php3601m6h9u98kfMG2fNy" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/leave-requests"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('tanggal_mulai', '2052-05-29');
body.append('tanggal_kembali', '2052-05-29');
body.append('alasan', 'n');
body.append('file_bukti', document.querySelector('input[name="file_bukti"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/v1/student/leave-requests

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

tanggal_mulai   string     

value bukan tanggal yang sah. Must be a date after or equal to today. Example: 2052-05-29

tanggal_kembali   string     

value bukan tanggal yang sah. Must be a date after or equal to tanggal_mulai. Example: 2052-05-29

alasan   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 1000 karakter. Example: n

file_bukti   file  optional    

Must be a file. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 5120 kilobytes. Example: /private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/php3601m6h9u98kfMG2fNy

POST api/v1/student/final-report

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/final-report" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "title=b"\
    --form "abstract=architecto"\
    --form "video_link=n"\
    --form "news_link=g"\
    --form "file=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/php7u1c4m0n6ch0dHU9IA3" \
    --form "article_1=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpneg16h3bpc3jc2S7MTD" \
    --form "article_2=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpro6crapl6jh89d5Z2eF" \
    --form "poster_1=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpdo83t3k66dtr6GaytFl" \
    --form "poster_2=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpi62458m1e76f03JNLko" \
    --form "poster_3=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phppb9up0amhte22WqnNWC" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/student/final-report"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('title', 'b');
body.append('abstract', 'architecto');
body.append('video_link', 'n');
body.append('news_link', 'g');
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);
body.append('article_1', document.querySelector('input[name="article_1"]').files[0]);
body.append('article_2', document.querySelector('input[name="article_2"]').files[0]);
body.append('poster_1', document.querySelector('input[name="poster_1"]').files[0]);
body.append('poster_2', document.querySelector('input[name="poster_2"]').files[0]);
body.append('poster_3', document.querySelector('input[name="poster_3"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

Request      

POST api/v1/student/final-report

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

title   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 300 karakter. Example: b

abstract   string  optional    

Example: architecto

video_link   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: n

news_link   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: g

file   file     

Must be a file. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 20480 kilobytes. Example: /private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/php7u1c4m0n6ch0dHU9IA3

article_1   file  optional    

Must be a file. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 10240 kilobytes. Example: /private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpneg16h3bpc3jc2S7MTD

article_2   file  optional    

Must be a file. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 10240 kilobytes. Example: /private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpro6crapl6jh89d5Z2eF

poster_1   file  optional    

Must be a file. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 5120 kilobytes. Example: /private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpdo83t3k66dtr6GaytFl

poster_2   file  optional    

Must be a file. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 5120 kilobytes. Example: /private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpi62458m1e76f03JNLko

poster_3   file  optional    

Must be a file. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 5120 kilobytes. Example: /private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phppb9up0amhte22WqnNWC

}"

    --data "{
    \"periode_id\": \"architecto\"
}"

);

    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "periode_id": "architecto"
};

}).then(response => response.json());

    --data "{

    \"kelompok_id\": 16,
    \"scores\": {

        \"ketercapaian\": 22,
        \"inovasi\": 7,
        \"administrasi\": 16,
        \"artikel\": 17
    }
}"

);

        "ketercapaian": 22,
        "inovasi": 7,
        "administrasi": 16,
        "artikel": 17
    }
};

    method: "POST",

}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/v1/dpl/evaluations

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

student_id   integer     

Example: 16

kelompok_id   integer     

Example: 16

scores   object     
relevansi   number  optional    

value harus minimal 0. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 100. Example: 1

ketercapaian   number  optional    

value harus minimal 0. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 100. Example: 22

inovasi   number  optional    

value harus minimal 0. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 100. Example: 7

administrasi   number  optional    

value harus minimal 0. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 100. Example: 16

artikel   number  optional    

value harus minimal 0. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 100. Example: 17

POST api/v1/dpl/evaluations/validate-import

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/dpl/evaluations/validate-import" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "file=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpob2b9atcjghsc03V893" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/dpl/evaluations/validate-import"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

file   file     

Must be a file. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 10240 kilobytes. Example: /private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpob2b9atcjghsc03V893

POST api/v1/dpl/monitoring

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/dpl/monitoring" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "kelompok_id=architecto"\
    --form "visit_date=2026-05-06T12:42:33"\
    --form "notes=n"\
    --form "latitude=-90"\
    --form "longitude=-179"\
    --form "photo=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpabudl6s8v8ag1qItg6U" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/dpl/monitoring"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('kelompok_id', 'architecto');
body.append('visit_date', '2026-05-06T12:42:33');
body.append('notes', 'n');
body.append('latitude', '-90');
body.append('longitude', '-179');
body.append('photo', document.querySelector('input[name="photo"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/dpl/monitoring

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

kelompok_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the kelompok_kkn table. Example: architecto

visit_date   string     

value bukan tanggal yang sah. Example: 2026-05-06T12:42:33

notes   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 5000 karakter. Example: n

latitude   number  optional    

value harus antara -90 dan 90. Example: -90

longitude   number  optional    

value harus antara -180 dan 180. Example: -179

photo   file  optional    

Must be a file. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 5120 kilobytes. Example: /private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpabudl6s8v8ag1qItg6U

Request      

POST api/v1/admin/periode

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

academic_year_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the tahun_akademik table. Example: architecto

jenis_kkn_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the jenis_kkn table.

periode   integer     

value harus minimal 1. Example: 22

name   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: g

theme   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: z

start_date   string     

value bukan tanggal yang sah. Example: 2026-05-06T12:42:33

end_date   string     

value bukan tanggal yang sah. value harus tanggal setelah start_date. Example: 2052-05-29

registration_start   string  optional    

value bukan tanggal yang sah. Example: 2026-05-06T12:42:33

registration_end   string  optional    

value bukan tanggal yang sah. Example: 2026-05-06T12:42:33

kuota   integer  optional    

value harus minimal 0. Example: 39

Request      

POST api/v1/admin/jenis-kkn

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

code   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 50 karakter. Example: b

name   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: n

description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

registration_mode   string     

Example: selective

Must be one of:
  • open
  • selective
  • proposal_based
placement_mode   string     

Example: host_defined

Must be one of:
  • automatic_after_approval
  • manual_admin
  • host_defined
  • proposal_defined
  • self_determined
color   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 20 karakter. Example: vdljnikhwaykcmyu

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: false

POST api/v1/admin/lokasi

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

village_name   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: b

district_name   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: n

regency_name   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: g

address   string  optional    

Example: architecto

latitude   number  optional    

Example: 4326.41688

longitude   number  optional    

Example: 4326.41688

capacity   integer  optional    

value harus minimal 0. Example: 77

fakultas_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the fakultas table.

POST api/v1/admin/lokasi/import

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/lokasi/import" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "file=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phptg72gnrsh96n3awyook"

    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/lokasi/import"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/v1/admin/kelompok

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

periode_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the periode table. Example: architecto

location_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the lokasi table.

nama_kelompok   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: n

code   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 50 karakter. Example: g

capacity   integer  optional    

value harus minimal 1. Example: 66

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/kelompok/import" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \

    --form "file=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpgt9pk7hb2os7b02kJKH" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/kelompok/import"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/v1/admin/workshops

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

periode_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the periode table. Example: architecto

title   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: n

description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

workshop_date   string     

value bukan tanggal yang sah. Example: 2026-05-06T12:42:33

methodology   string  optional    

Example: architecto

start_time   string  optional    

Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 12:42

end_time   string  optional    

Must be a valid date in the format H:i. value harus tanggal setelah start_time. Example: 2052-05-29

location   string  optional    

Example: architecto

max_participants   integer  optional    

value harus minimal 1. Example: 22

Request      

POST api/v1/admin/peserta/pindah

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

peserta_kkn_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the peserta_kkn table. Example: architecto

target_periode_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the periode table. Example: architecto

target_kelompok_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the kelompok_kkn table.

reason   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 1000 karakter. Example: n

POST api/v1/admin/dosen/import

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/dosen/import" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "file=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/phpti02blingeva9zc04Lv" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/dosen/import"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/grade-reports/finalize-mass" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"ids\": [
        16
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/grade-reports/finalize-mass"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "ids": [
        16
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

curl --request POST \

);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "periode_id": "architecto",
    "ids": [

    ]

    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/konfigurasi-penilaian" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"periode_id\": \"architecto\",
    \"dpl_weight\": 4326.41688,
    \"village_weight\": 4326.41688,
    \"lppm_weight\": 4326.41688
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/konfigurasi-penilaian"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "periode_id": "architecto",
    "dpl_weight": 4326.41688,
    "village_weight": 4326.41688,
    "lppm_weight": 4326.41688
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

POST api/v1/admin/warta-utama

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/warta-utama" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "title=b"\
    --form "content=architecto"\
    --form "excerpt=n"\
    --form "category=g"\
    --form "is_active="\
    --form "image=@/private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/php7v218btb0u5a9l8gSOI" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/warta-utama"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('title', 'b');
body.append('content', 'architecto');
body.append('excerpt', 'n');
body.append('category', 'g');
body.append('is_active', '');
body.append('image', document.querySelector('input[name="image"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Request      

POST api/v1/admin/warta-utama

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

title   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: b

content   string     

Example: architecto

excerpt   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 500 karakter. Example: n

category   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 50 karakter. Example: g

image   file  optional    

Must be a file. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 2048 kilobytes. Example: /private/var/folders/l1/0yf6hgxs6058csy_b9j_sw0h0000gn/T/php7v218btb0u5a9l8gSOI

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: false

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 50 karakter. Example: m

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

user_id   integer     

The ID of the user. Example: 763

GET api/v1/admin/mahasiswa

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/mahasiswa" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/mahasiswa"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (401):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
vary: Origin
 

{
    "success": false,
    "error": {
        "code": "UNAUTHORIZED",
        "message": "Tidak terotentikasi. Silakan masuk terlebih dahulu."
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request PATCH \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/konten-publik/skema" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"schemes\": [
        {
            \"name\": \"b\",
            \"description\": \"Eius et animi quos velit et.\",
            \"requirements\": \"architecto\"
        }
    ]
}"

    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/konten-publik/skema"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "schemes": [
        {
            "name": "b",
            "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
            "requirements": "architecto"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

PATCH api/v1/admin/konten-publik/skema

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

schemes   object[]     
name   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: b

description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

requirements   string  optional    

Example: architecto

Example: application/json

Store a device token for push notifications

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/device-tokens" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"token\": \"architecto\",
    \"device_type\": \"ngzmiyvdljnikhwa\",
    \"platform\": \"ykcmyuwpwlvqwrsi\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/device-tokens"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "token": "architecto",
    "device_type": "ngzmiyvdljnikhwa",
    "platform": "ykcmyuwpwlvqwrsi"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/device-tokens

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

token   string     

Example: architecto

device_type   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 20 karakter. Example: ngzmiyvdljnikhwa

platform   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 20 karakter. Example: ykcmyuwpwlvqwrsi

POST /api/attendance - Create new attendance record

requires authentication

This is the main endpoint for capturing attendance (GPS, photos, etc) Supports both online and offline submission

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/attendance" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"latitude\": -89,
    \"longitude\": -179,
    \"accuracy_meters\": 84,
    \"altitude_meters\": 4326.41688,
    \"heading_degrees\": 0,
    \"speed_mps\": 8,
    \"timestamp_client\": \"2026-05-06T12:42:33.000Z\",
    \"timestamp_gps\": \"2026-05-06T12:42:33.000Z\",
    \"activity_type\": \"absen_keluar\",
    \"proof_photo_base64\": \"y\",
    \"device_signature\": \"architecto\",
    \"user_agent\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/attendance"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "latitude": -89,
    "longitude": -179,
    "accuracy_meters": 84,
    "altitude_meters": 4326.41688,
    "heading_degrees": 0,
    "speed_mps": 8,
    "timestamp_client": "2026-05-06T12:42:33.000Z",
    "timestamp_gps": "2026-05-06T12:42:33.000Z",
    "activity_type": "absen_keluar",
    "proof_photo_base64": "y",
    "device_signature": "architecto",
    "user_agent": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/attendance

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

latitude   number     

value harus antara -90 dan 90. Example: -89

longitude   number     

value harus antara -180 dan 180. Example: -179

accuracy_meters   number  optional    

value harus minimal 0. Example: 84

altitude_meters   number  optional    

Example: 4326.41688

heading_degrees   number  optional    

value harus antara 0 dan 360. Example: 0

speed_mps   number  optional    

value harus minimal 0. Example: 8

timestamp_client   string     

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d\TH:i:s.000\Z. Example: 2026-05-06T12:42:33.000Z

timestamp_gps   string  optional    

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d\TH:i:s.000\Z. Example: 2026-05-06T12:42:33.000Z

activity_type   string     

Example: absen_keluar

Must be one of:
  • absen_masuk
  • absen_keluar
  • logbook_activity
  • workshop_attendance
  • meeting_attendance
proof_photo_base64   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 5000000 karakter. Example: y

device_signature   string  optional    

~5MB. Example: architecto

user_agent   string  optional    

Example: architecto

GET /api/attendance - List user's attendance records

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8000/api/attendance" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/attendance"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (401):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
vary: Origin
 

{
    "success": false,
    "error": {
        "code": "UNAUTHORIZED",
        "message": "Tidak terotentikasi. Silakan masuk terlebih dahulu."
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

GET api/attendance

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Generate a new API key (admin-only, protected by admin secret).

requires authentication

POST /api/admin/keys Header: x-admin-secret: Body: { "name": "Project Name", "owner": "email@example.com", "permissions": ["read", "write"] }

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/admin/keys" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"owner\": \"n\",
    \"permissions\": [
        \"write\"
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/admin/keys"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "owner": "n",
    "permissions": [
        "write"
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/admin/keys

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: b

owner   string     

value harus berupa alamat email yang sah. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: n

permissions   string[]  optional    
Must be one of:
  • read
  • write
  • delete

requires authentication

curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/admin/keys/16/revoke" \

Self-service registration — client registers and receives an API key.

requires authentication

POST /api/register Body: { "project_name": "My App", "email": "client@email.com", "use_case": "optional" }

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8000/api/register" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"project_name\": \"b\",
    \"email\": \"zbailey@example.net\",
    \"use_case\": \"i\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8000/api/register"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "project_name": "b",
    "email": "zbailey@example.net",
    "use_case": "i"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/register

Headers

Authorization        

Example: Bearer your-token

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

project_name   string     

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: b

email   string     

value harus berupa alamat email yang sah. value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 255 karakter. Example: zbailey@example.net

use_case   string  optional    

value seharusnya tidak lebih dari 1000 karakter. Example: i

List / filter data from an allowed table using Eloquent.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/data/architecto" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer your-token" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/data/architecto"
);

    "Authorization": "Bearer your-token",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

content-type: application/json
x-ratelimit-limit: 60
x-ratelimit-remaining: 59
vary: Origin

}
